# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 648. Foreign Commercial Motor Transp.
##### § 648.002 — Rules

In addition to rules required by this chapter, the Texas Department of Motor Vehicles, the Department of Public Safety, and the Texas Department of Insurance may adopt other rules to carry out this chapter.

*Acts 2009, 81st Leg., R.S., Ch. 933 (H.B.3097), Sec. 2O.01, eff. September 1, 2009.*
